name: Ham-Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: pastry for a 9-inch quiche dish or pie pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch quiche dish or pie pan with pastry; trim off excess pastry around the edges.
2. Place a piece of buttered aluminum foil, with the buttered side down, over the pastry. Gently press into the pastry shell.
3. Cover the foil with a layer of dried peas or beans.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes; remove the peas and foil.
5. Prick the shell and bake for an additional 3 to 5 minutes, or until lightly browned. Allow to cool.
6. In a bowl, combine milk, mayonnaise, eggs, and cornstarch; mix until smooth.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients (ham, Swiss cheese, green pepper, green onion, and pepper).
8. Pour the mixture into the quiche shell.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes, or until set.
10. Yields one 9-inch quiche.
